intent: Build a responsive product landing page using an Agent Pack.
goal: Deliver a working landing page with design, implementation, evidence, and review.
nonGoals: Do not add a backend service
Do not create more than one task phase
constraints: Use at most five temporary agents
Archive reusable template only after Phase 5
successCriteria: Desktop and mobile views do not visibly overflow
Code review has no unresolved high-risk findings

capabilityMapping.fallback: Split into a separate implementation phase
Master performs a manual verification pass

routingDecision.reason: The request requires sequential product, design, implementation, evidence, and review roles.

microSops.context: Read user brief and existing project files.
microSops.deliverable: PRD summary with goal, non-goals, and success criteria.
microSops.exitCondition: PRD is sufficient for UI and frontend execution.
Frontend expert can implement from the structure.

microSops.context: Read PRD, UI structure, and existing frontend entry points.
negativeConstraints: Do not skip local run checks
microSops.exitCondition: App starts and core view renders on desktop and mobile.

microSops.context: Read implementation notes and success criteria.
Read changed files and validation evidence.
microSops.deliverable: Code review findings ordered by risk.
negativeConstraints: Do not give generic feedback without evidence
microSops.exitCondition: High-risk findings are specific and actionable.
